description_long: This radiator features a classic cast-iron design with seven vertical columns, each composed of a series of rounded, ribbed fins for efficient heat dissipation. The radiator is mounted against a flat, rectangular back panel and sits on a sturdy base, suggesting a floor-standing installation. Two prominent manual valves are visible on the left side, one at the top and one at the bottom, likely for water inlet and outlet control. The surface of the radiator is dark metallic, with a slightly glossy finish that highlights its industrial character. The fins are evenly spaced, creating a uniform grille-like appearance across the front. No decorative grille or cover is present, leaving the functional elements fully exposed.
description: A dark metallic, floor-standing radiator with seven vertical ribbed columns and two manual valves, mounted against a flat back panel. The design is industrial and functional, with exposed fins and no decorative cover.
description_view_0: Front view showing all seven vertical columns, both manual valves, and the ribbed fin structure.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the radiator's narrow depth and the protruding valves and pipe connections.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying only the flat back panel with no visible radiator details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the radiator's depth and support structure.
attribute_pipe_connections: two, bottom left and top left, horizontally oriented
